# Retrospective Output Template

## Key Observations

- Main facts or patterns seen during the sprint.

## What Went Well

- Practices or conditions that helped delivery.

## What Did Not Go Well

- Friction points, delays, or recurring issues.

## Likely Root Causes

- Plausible causes behind the main issues.

## Improvement Actions

- Action to try next.
- Owner.
- Expected effect.

## Follow-Up Check

- How the team will verify improvement in the next sprint.
